name: electrobun-hello-world
description: A simple Electrobun app showcasing core features

scripts.daemon: bun run build:native && bun run src/daemon/index.ts
scripts.build:dev: bun install && bun run build:native && electrobun build && bash scripts/patch-plist.sh
scripts.build:native: swiftc -O -o src/native/wake-listener src/native/wake-listener.swift -framework Speech -framework AVFoundation -framework AppKit -Xlinker -sectcreate -Xlinker __TEXT -Xlinker __info_plist -Xlinker src/native/wake-listener-info.plist && codesign --force --sign - --entitlements src/native/wake-listener.entitlements src/native/wake-listener
